case_title: DOMINIQUE N ONEIL VS. REX F TONGOL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT SATISFIED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY ONEIL, DOMINIQUE N AS TO DEFENDANT TONGOL, REX F ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ONEIL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REX F. TONGOL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT TONGOL, REX F HEARING SET FOR JUN-19-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ONEIL, DOMINIQUE N RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TONGOL, REX F $4,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,705.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $3000.00 AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TONGOL, REX F
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED NOV-07-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TONGOL, REX F

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-27-2017 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DOES NOT APPEAR TO HAVE SIGNED FOR THE CERTIFIED MAIL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
